ocr_findings.description: Small sidebar image '集中処理システムから分散処理システムへ' section has a mascot image captured as placeholder; the sidebar label text is preserved in OCR as a heading, so no meaningful content lost.

reviewer_notes: Dense learning content page covering system definitions, hardware/software composition, and processing type classification. Three bullet-point categories listed. OCR is highly faithful to the image text; all key terms (ハードウェア, ソフトウェア, 集中処理, 分散処理, ホストコンピュータ) correctly captured. Label 'content' is correct.
